name: squarewright
description: An open-source toolbox for assembling your own repo-local AI code reviewer on top of Pi.
author: André Zagatti
//dependencies-note: Pi (@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent) becomes a direct dependency when the review harness lands (v0.1). The harness uses it as a library (createAgentSession/defineTool); a fast deterministic grounder may be a separate polyglot binary.
